---
pagetitle: "Francisco Garre-Frutos, PhD"
description: "Postdoctoral researcher in experimental psychology."
image: "/assets/og-image.png"
header-includes: |
  <meta property="og:type" content="profile">
---

::: {data-site=""}

```{=html}
<!-- NAV -->
<nav style="position:sticky; top:0; z-index:20; background:var(--nav); backdrop-filter:blur(10px); border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);">
  <div style="max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 40px; height:64px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;">
    <a href="#top" title="Francisco Garre-Frutos" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:13px;">
      <svg width="37" height="21" viewBox="0 0 38 22" fill="none" aria-hidden="true" style="display:block; overflow:visible; transform:translateY(-1px);">
        <path d="M3,17.4 C9,17.4 10,9.2 18,8.2 C25,7.4 30,7.2 35,7" fill="none" style="stroke:var(--ink3); stroke-width:1.3; opacity:.6;" stroke-linecap="round"></path>
        <circle cx="35" cy="7" r="2.9" fill="none" style="stroke:var(--ink3); stroke-width:1; opacity:.55;"></circle>
        <circle cx="35" cy="7" r="1.3" style="fill:var(--ink3); opacity:.6;"></circle>
        <line x1="2" y1="18" x2="34" y2="18" style="stroke:var(--ink3); stroke-width:.9; opacity:.3;"></line>
        <path d="M2,18 C5.5,18 5.5,8.5 9,8.5 C12.5,8.5 12.5,18 16,18 Z" style="fill:var(--ink3); opacity:.42;"></path>
        <path d="M9,18 C13,18 13,5 17,5 C21,5 21,18 25,18 Z" style="fill:var(--logo-ocre); opacity:.52;"></path>
        <path d="M18,18 C21.5,18 21.5,9.5 25,9.5 C28.5,9.5 28.5,18 32,18 Z" style="fill:var(--accent); opacity:.42;"></path>
      </svg>
      <span class="nav-wordmark" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:15px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.11em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink); white-space:nowrap;"><span class="nav-fname">Francisco </span><span style="color:var(--accent);">Garre-Frutos</span></span>
    </a>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center;">
      <div class="nav-links" style="display:flex; gap:30px; align-items:center;">
        <a href="#research" class="nav-link">Research</a>
        <a href="#journey" class="nav-link">Journey</a>
        <a href="#contact" class="nav-link">Contact</a>
        <a href="/cv/" class="nav-link">CV</a>
        <button data-theme-toggle aria-label="Toggle dark mode" class="theme-toggle">
          <i data-theme-icon class="fa-solid fa-sun" style="font-size:15px;"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="nav-mobile">
        <button class="nav-burger" data-nav-toggle aria-label="Open menu" aria-expanded="false">
          <i data-nav-icon class="fa-solid fa-bars" style="font-size:15px;"></i>
        </button>
        <div class="nav-menu" data-nav-menu hidden>
          <a href="#research" class="nav-menu-link">Research</a>
          <a href="#journey" class="nav-menu-link">Journey</a>
          <a href="#contact" class="nav-menu-link">Contact</a>
          <a href="/cv/" class="nav-menu-link">CV</a>
          <button class="nav-menu-theme" data-theme-toggle aria-label="Toggle dark mode">
            <i data-theme-icon class="fa-solid fa-sun"></i> <span>Switch theme</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO / MASTHEAD -->
<header id="top" style="max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:80px 40px 0;">
  <div style="display:flex; align-items:baseline; justify-content:space-between; gap:20px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:0.07em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink3); padding-bottom:18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);">
    <span style="color:var(--accent);">Postdoctoral Researcher · Experimental Psychologist</span>
  </div>

  <h1 class="masthead-name" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight:600; font-size:50px; line-height:0.98; letter-spacing:-0.01em; margin:34px 0 0; color:var(--ink);">Francisco Garre-Frutos<span style="color:var(--ink3); font-weight:400; letter-spacing:0;">, PhD</span></h1>

  <p class="masthead-thesis" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:20px; line-height:1.4; letter-spacing:0; color:var(--ink2); max-width:760px; margin:26px 0 0;">How learning and attention shape human cognition and behavior.</p>

  <div class="hero-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:300px 1fr; gap:64px; align-items:start; margin-top:56px;">
    <div>
      <figure class="hero-figure" style="margin:0; width:300px; position:relative;">
        <div style="position:absolute; inset:0; transform:translate(14px,14px); border:1.5px solid var(--accent); border-radius:5px; pointer-events:none; transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);"></div>
        <div class="portrait-card" style="position:relative; background:var(--card); border-radius:5px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 14px 36px -18px rgba(46,34,24,.45);">
          <div class="hero-photo" style="width:300px; height:300px; overflow:hidden;">
            <picture><source srcset="/assets/francisco.webp" type="image/webp"><img src="/assets/francisco.jpg" alt="Francisco Garre-Frutos" width="600" height="720" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:50% 52%; display:block;"></picture>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:16px 18px; border-top:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--card);">
            <p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink3); margin:0 0 13px;">Find me on</p>
            <div style="display:flex; gap:21px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <a href="https://scholar.google.es/citations?user=RWd96bwAAAAJ&hl=es" target="_blank" title="Google Scholar" class="social-link"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar" style="font-size:20px;"></i></a>
              <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9810-186X" target="_blank" title="ORCID" class="social-link"><i class="ai ai-orcid" style="font-size:20px;"></i></a>
              <a href="https://github.com/franfrutos" target="_blank" title="GitHub" class="social-link"><i class="fa-brands fa-github" style="font-size:19px;"></i></a>
              <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Francisco-Garre-Frutos-2" target="_blank" title="ResearchGate" class="social-link"><i class="ai ai-researchgate" style="font-size:19px;"></i></a>
              <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/frangfr.bsky.social" target="_blank" title="Bluesky" class="social-link"><i class="fa-brands fa-bluesky" style="font-size:19px;"></i></a>
              <a href="https://x.com/Fran_gfr" target="_blank" title="X" class="social-link"><i class="fa-brands fa-x-twitter" style="font-size:18px;"></i></a>
              <a href="mailto:fgfrutos@gmail.com" title="Email" class="social-link"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope" style="font-size:18px;"></i></a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </figure>
    </div>

    <div style="padding-top:4px;">
```

::: {.hero-intro}
I'm a postdoctoral researcher in Psychology at the Autonomous University of Madrid, where I work in the [Cognition, Attention & Learning Lab (CALL)](https://calluam.wordpress.com/){.inline-link target="_blank"} on how (implicit) learning shapes the way we attend and decide.

Beyond that, I have a soft spot for metascience, computational modelling and psychometrics applied to experimental tasks. More broadly, I'm drawn to anything that helps ensure the tasks we use in the lab are valid, with an emphasis on assessing this cumulatively and transparently.
:::

```{=html}
      <div style="display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <a href="#research" class="btn-solid">Read my research</a>
        <a href="/cv/" class="btn-ghost">See CV</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- SINGLETON DIVIDER 1 -->
<div class="motif" style="max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:60px 40px; display:flex; gap:16px; justify-content:center; align-items:center;">
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot singleton"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  <span class="motif-dot"></span>
</div>

<!-- RESEARCH -->
<section id="research" style="max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:8px 40px 88px;">
  <div style="display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:18px; padding-bottom:18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--ink); margin-bottom:30px;">
    <h2 style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight:500; font-size:26px; letter-spacing:0; margin:0; color:var(--ink);">Research</h2>
  </div>
  <div id="research-chips" style="display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:8px;"></div>
  <div id="research-threads"></div>
</section>

<!-- SINGLETON DIVIDER 2 -->
<div class="motif" style="max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 40px;">
  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:20px;">
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot singleton"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
    <span class="motif-dot"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- JOURNEY / MAP -->
<section id="journey" style="max-width:1140px; margin:0 auto; padding:46px 40px 92px;">
  <div style="display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:18px; padding-bottom:18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--ink); margin-bottom:8px;">
    <h2 style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight:500; font-size:26px; letter-spacing:0; margin:0; color:var(--ink);">My journey in science</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="journey-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:300px 1fr; gap:64px; align-items:start; margin-top:26px;">
    <div class="sticky-side" style="position:sticky; top:88px;">
      <p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:0.07em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--accent); margin:0 0 14px;">The less boring CV section</p>
      <p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-style:italic; font-size:19px; line-height:1.46; color:var(--ink2); margin:0;">A map of some of the things I&rsquo;ve done.</p>
    </div>
```

::: {.journey-prose}
Ever since starting my psychology degree in 2016, I have been fascinated by the idea of studying cognition and behaviour in a laboratory setting. When I realised that this was actually possible, I set myself a clear goal: to pursue a career in research.

After completing my undergraduate degree, I moved to Granada for a Master's in Cognitive and Behavioural Neuroscience, and then began my PhD at the same institution, under the supervision of Profs Juan Lupiáñez and Miguel Vadillo. My research focused on one of my main interests: how our experience of the world shapes cognition. Along the way, I met wonderful people and visited wonderful places, and now, as an early-career researcher, I look back and think, "Wow." Science has brought me much more than just stress and uncertainty; it has also given me the chance to travel and experience things I never expected.

So instead of just dropping a boring "CV" section here (you can [see my boring cv](/cv/){.inline-link}, if you must), I'd rather show you how far science has taken me. I expect to update this map frequently.
:::

```{=html}
  </div>
  <p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.06em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink3); margin:40px 0 0;">Filter the list, or tap a city on the map.</p>

  <div class="journey-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr; gap:40px; align-items:start; margin-top:20px;">
    <div style="position:sticky; top:84px;">
      <div style="position:relative;">
        <div id="fgf-mapwrap" style="position:relative; width:100%; aspect-ratio:1000 / 500; overflow:hidden; border-radius:5px; cursor:grab; touch-action:none; background:var(--map-ocean); border:1px solid var(--ink3); box-shadow:0 18px 48px -30px rgba(36,26,16,.55);">
          <div id="fgf-stage" style="position:absolute; inset:0; transform-origin:0 0; transform:translate(0px,0px) scale(1);">
            <div id="fgf-worldmap" style="position:absolute; inset:0; color:var(--map-land);"></div>
          </div>
          <div id="fgf-pins" style="position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:3;"></div>
          <div style="position:absolute; right:12px; bottom:12px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; z-index:6;">
            <button data-map-zoomin aria-label="Zoom in" class="map-zoom-btn" style="width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:7px; border:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--card); color:var(--ink2); font-size:17px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">+</button>
            <button data-map-zoomout aria-label="Zoom out" class="map-zoom-btn" style="width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:7px; border:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--card); color:var(--ink2); font-size:17px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">−</button>
            <button data-map-reset aria-label="Reset view" class="map-zoom-btn" style="width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:7px; border:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--card); color:var(--ink2); font-size:13px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;"><i class="fa-solid fa-expand"></i></button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="position:absolute; left:9px; top:9px; width:13px; height:13px; border-left:2px solid var(--accent); border-top:2px solid var(--accent); z-index:8; pointer-events:none;"></div>
        <div style="position:absolute; right:9px; top:9px; width:13px; height:13px; border-right:2px solid var(--accent); border-top:2px solid var(--accent); z-index:8; pointer-events:none;"></div>
        <div style="position:absolute; left:9px; bottom:9px; width:13px; height:13px; border-left:2px solid var(--accent); border-bottom:2px solid var(--accent); z-index:8; pointer-events:none;"></div>
        <div style="position:absolute; right:9px; bottom:9px; width:13px; height:13px; border-right:2px solid var(--accent); border-bottom:2px solid var(--accent); z-index:8; pointer-events:none;"></div>
      </div>
      <p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.05em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink3); margin:14px 2px 0; text-align:center;">Drag to pan · scroll to zoom · tap a city</p>
    </div>

    <div>
      <div id="journey-chips" style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px;"></div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; margin:18px 0 0;">
        <span id="journey-count" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.05em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink3);"></span>
        <span id="journey-clear"></span>
      </div>
      <div id="journey-list" style="margin-top:4px;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact" style="background:var(--panel-bg); color:var(--panel-ink);">
  <div style="max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:78px 40px 40px;">
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:18px; padding-bottom:18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--panel-line); margin-bottom:40px;">
      <h2 style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight:500; font-size:26px; letter-spacing:0; margin:0; color:var(--panel-ink);">Get in touch</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:300px 1fr; gap:64px; align-items:start;">
      <div>
        <p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:0.07em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--panel-ink2); margin:0 0 14px;">Based at</p>
        <p style="font-size:18px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; color:var(--panel-ink); margin:0; line-height:1.45;">Cognition, Attention &amp; Learning Lab (CALL)</p>
        <p style="font-size:15px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-style:italic; color:var(--panel-ink2); margin:6px 0 0; line-height:1.45;">Autonomous University of Madrid, Spain</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p style="font-size:24px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; color:var(--panel-ink); margin:0 0 30px; max-width:540px; line-height:1.4;">Drop me a line — I'm always happy to talk.</p>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <a href="mailto:fgfrutos@gmail.com" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12.5px; letter-spacing:0.05em; text-transform:uppercase; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; padding:13px 20px; background:var(--panel-accent); color:#fff; border-radius:3px; font-weight:500;"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i> fgfrutos@gmail.com</a>
          <a href="https://scholar.google.es/citations?user=RWd96bwAAAAJ&hl=es" target="_blank" title="Google Scholar" class="social-ic-dark"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar" style="font-size:18px;"></i></a>
          <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9810-186X" target="_blank" title="ORCID" class="social-ic-dark"><i class="ai ai-orcid" style="font-size:18px;"></i></a>
          <a href="https://github.com/franfrutos" target="_blank" title="GitHub" class="social-ic-dark"><i class="fa-brands fa-github" style="font-size:17px;"></i></a>
          <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Francisco-Garre-Frutos-2" target="_blank" title="ResearchGate" class="social-ic-dark"><i class="ai ai-researchgate" style="font-size:17px;"></i></a>
          <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/frangfr.bsky.social" target="_blank" title="Bluesky" class="social-ic-dark"><i class="fa-brands fa-bluesky" style="font-size:17px;"></i></a>
          <a href="https://x.com/Fran_gfr" target="_blank" title="X" class="social-ic-dark"><i class="fa-brands fa-x-twitter" style="font-size:16px;"></i></a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px 28px; margin:64px 0 0;">
      <p style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; color:var(--panel-ink2); margin:0; line-height:1.7;">© 2026 Francisco Garre-Frutos&nbsp;·&nbsp;made with R<i class="fa-brands fa-r-project" style="font-size:13px; color:#276DC3; vertical-align:middle; margin:0 1px 0 4px;"></i>, Quarto<img src="/assets/logos/quarto.svg" alt="Quarto" width="13" height="13" style="vertical-align:middle; margin:0 1px 0 4px;"> and Claude<img src="/assets/logos/claude.svg" alt="Claude" width="13" height="13" style="vertical-align:middle; margin:0 1px 0 4px;"></p>
      <a href="https://github.com/franfrutos/franfrutos.github.io" target="_blank" title="Source on GitHub" style="font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; color:var(--panel-ink2); display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; white-space:nowrap;"><i class="fa-brands fa-github" style="font-size:15px;"></i>View the source at GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

:::
